style_theme: premium tea gift box still life with restrained gifting mood, clean commercial polish, and unified warm-neutral atmosphere
color_strategy: treat the saturated red package as the only high-saturation focal point
if the package is highly saturated, keep the background in low-saturation ivory, linen, warm gray, pale wood, or stone
props must stay desaturated and never compete with the package
lighting_strategy: main light direction fixed at upper-right across the full set
use soft directional commercial light with clean edges and stable shadow density
lens_strategy: keep a 50mm commercial lens feel across the full set
use shallow-to-moderate depth of field without package distortion
prop_system: neutral ceramic tea ware, muted wood tray, linen fabric, and minimal gift-card accents only
keep the prop family restrained and consistent across all shots
background_strategy: prefer ivory, linen, warm gray, pale wood, and stone backgrounds
keep textures subtle so the package remains the visual center
text_strategy: prioritize upper-left, upper-right, and upper area for text safe zones
reserve clean negative space instead of textured or high-contrast regions
global_negative_rules: do not redesign the package structure
do not add competing saturated props
do not break the fixed main light direction
do not switch lens language across shots
